title: KeyStrokePlus
description: A mod that lets you display the keys you press (the key strokes) and is very customizable
body:
**This is the first working version of my keystroke mod. It might be buggy!**

lmk on discord if there are any bug,s username on discord is **omrismain**

Very Customizable Keystroke mod
has full keyboard key Strokes!
RGB!
Keypress colors!
